Open-source social media scheduling tool: Open-source social media scheduling tool supporting 30+ platforms
Authenticate with your Postiz API key. T:
Authenticate with your Postiz API key. Triggers require manual webhook setup in your Postiz dashboard.

To get your API key:
1. Log in to your Postiz dashboard
2. Go to **Settings > Developers > Public API**
3. Generate a new API key and copy it
The API base URL. Use `https://api.posti: The API base URL. Use `https://api.postiz.com/public/v1` for Postiz Cloud, or `https://your-domain.com/api/public/v1` for self-hosted instances.
Authenticate with your Postiz email and: Authenticate with your Postiz email and password. This mode enables automatic webhook registration for triggers — no polling needed.
Your Postiz instance URL. Use `https://a: Your Postiz instance URL. Use `https://app.postiz.com` for Postiz Cloud, or `https://your-domain.com` for self-hosted instances.
Create or schedule a post on one or more: Create or schedule a post on one or more connected channels
Retrieve posts within a date range: Retrieve posts within a date range
Delete a post and all other posts in the: Delete a post and all other posts in the same group
List all connected social media channels: List all connected social media channels in your organization

Retrieve analytics (likes, comments, sha: Retrieve analytics (likes, comments, shares, impressions) for a specific published post
Upload a media file from a URL to Postiz: Upload a media file from a URL to Postiz. Returns the file path to use when creating posts.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Choose whether to publish immediately, s: Choose whether to publish immediately, schedule for later, or save as draft
The date and time to publish the post (I: The date and time to publish the post (ISO 8601 format). Required for scheduled posts.
Select the connected social media channe: Select the connected social media channel
The text content of the post: The text content of the post
URLs of images or videos to attach. Uplo: URLs of images or videos to attach. Upload media first using the "Upload File from URL" action, then paste the returned path here.
Automatically shorten URLs in the post c: Automatically shorten URLs in the post content

The ID of the post to delete. You can ge: The ID of the post to delete. You can get this from the "List Posts" or "New Published Post" trigger output.
Number of days to look back for analytic: Number of days to look back for analytics (e.g. 7, 30, 90)
The ID of the published post. You can ge: The ID of the published post. You can get this from the "List Posts" or "New Published Post" trigger output.
The public URL of the image or video to: The public URL of the image or video to upload
